summary: Iteration 23 - Extended Notification System, Availability Slots, and Group Lesson Features Testing Complete. Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). All new features fully functional: like notifications, story reaction notifications, chat message notifications, lesson_booked notifications, availability slot lesson_type field, mute-all endpoint, and group lesson token endpoint.

frontend_issues.note: Frontend testing skipped per request (backend only testing)

critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/posts/{id}/like - VERIFIED: Creates 'like' notification for post owner (not for self-likes)
POST /api/stories/{id}/react - VERIFIED: Creates 'story_reaction' notification with emoji data
POST /api/conversations/{id}/messages - VERIFIED: Creates 'chat_message' notification for recipient
POST /api/bookings - VERIFIED: Creates 'lesson_booked' notification for teacher
POST /api/availability-slots - VERIFIED: Accepts lesson_type field (single/group/both), defaults to 'single'
GET /api/notifications - VERIFIED: Returns all notification types sorted by created_at desc
GET /api/notifications/unread-count - VERIFIED: Returns correct unread count
POST /api/notifications/{id}/read - VERIFIED: Marks notification as read
POST /api/group-lessons/{id}/mute-all - VERIFIED: Clears raised_hands and allowed_speakers arrays
POST /api/group-lessons/{id}/token - VERIFIED: Returns owner token for teacher (is_teacher=true), participant token for student (is_teacher=false)
Security - VERIFIED: Only teacher can call mute-all (403 for students)
Security - VERIFIED: Unbooked students cannot get token (403)
Security - VERIFIED: Token not available before lesson is live (400)
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Tests create TEST_ prefixed posts, stories, slots, and group lessons for each test case.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Extended notification system fully tested and working. Notification types verified: 'like' (post likes), 'story_reaction' (story emoji reactions), 'chat_message' (new messages), 'lesson_booked' (slot bookings), 'booking_confirmed' (group lesson bookings), 'group_lesson_started' (when teacher starts). Availability slots now support lesson_type field. Group lesson mute-all and token endpoints working correctly with proper authorization.
mocked_api_note: Payment system is MOCKED. Daily.co integration is REAL and working (tokens generated successfully).
